# Andrea Estep — Venice Beach Painter

> Andrea Estep is a contemporary painter in Venice Beach, California. She
> paints outdoors, year-round, in the garden behind her 1920s Venice Beach
> bungalow, and her finished canvases dry in direct California sun. Every
> painting is a one-of-one original — she never sells prints, editions, or
> reproductions of any kind. When a painting is collected, it is gone for
> good. Commissions are open.

## Key facts

- Artist: Andrea Estep, painter, Venice Beach, California (90291)
- Website: https://www.andreaestep.art
- Originals only: no prints, no giclées, no editions — every work is 1 of 1
- Every painting is signed and comes with a certificate of authenticity
- Materials: Liquitex acrylics on 100% cotton stretched canvas
- Paints outdoors in a Southern-California zen garden (olive trees, bird of
  paradise, grape vines); canvases dry in direct sunlight
- Gallery: her own 1920s Venice Beach bungalow — private viewings by
  appointment
- Commissions: open — past commissions include "French Surfer Girl in
  Venice" (collected by Audrey) and "Venice Bungalow" (collected by Sabrina)
- Upcoming works: "Linnie Canal" ($850) and "Cielo Farms" ($600)
- Contact: via the form at https://www.andreaestep.art/#contact

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.andreaestep.art/): recent paintings, the garden studio,
  the bungalow gallery, about the artist, contact form
- [The Collection](https://www.andreaestep.art/collection.html): every
  painting to date, including collected works, plus commission information
